description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Create a private 10‑team head‑to‑head points fantasy baseball league with free entry and a snake draft scheduled for an 8:00 PM evening in early June 2025.

tasks.instruction: Join a public 12‑team rotisserie league that has an evening live draft during the first week of April 2025, choosing the earliest available draft that meets these criteria.

tasks.instruction: For your Opening Day lineup, start your two highest‑projected starting pitchers and replace the first day‑to‑day starting hitter with a healthy bench hitter in that spot.

tasks.instruction: From the free‑agent hitters list, add the first four players with at least 20 projected home runs to your watchlist.

tasks.instruction: Propose a trade sending your first bench outfielder to the team directly above you in the standings in exchange for that team’s starting pitcher with the lowest ERA that is 3.50 or better.
tasks.name: Propose a trade sending your first bench outfielder to the team directly above you in the standings in exchange for that team’s starting pitcher with the lowest ERA that is 3.50 or better.

tasks.instruction: Compare the first two first basemen on your roster by their projected points for the next 7 days and set the one with the higher projection as your starting 1B.
tasks.name: Compare the first two first basemen on your roster by their projected points for the next 7 days and set the one with the higher projection as your starting 1B.

tasks.instruction: From the waiver wire, claim a relief pitcher with at least 5 projected saves, under 50% ownership, and an ERA of 3.00 or lower, and as part of the claim drop your bench pitcher with the highest ERA.
tasks.name: From the waiver wire, claim a relief pitcher with at least 5 projected saves, under 50% ownership, and an ERA of 3.00 or lower, and as part of the claim drop your bench pitcher with the highest ERA.

tasks.instruction: Update your notification settings so that trade and injury alerts are turned on with an immediate frequency, while league chat notifications are turned off, leaving all other notification types unchanged.

tasks.instruction: In your league standings, sort teams by total points and mark the three highest‑scoring teams other than your own as rivals or favorites.
